title: UiPath Reports Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
text: UiPath reported Q2 Fiscal 2026 earnings. Key Financial Metrics: Revenue $362 million (14% YoY growth), ARR $1.723 billion (11% YoY growth), Net New ARR $31 million, Dollar-Based Net Retention 108%, Non-GAAP Operating Income $62 million, Operating Cash Flow $42 million, Adjusted Free Cash Flow $45 million, Cash & Equivalents $1.52 billion. CEO Daniel Dines emphasized momentum in agentic automation deployment: "Our continued innovation and best-in-class products are enabling customers across industries to move beyond pilots into production deployments." He highlighted that "customers consistently tell us that automation and agentic AI are stronger together." Dines noted the strategic positioning, stating customers are "orchestrating agents, robots, and humans to achieve real outcomes" and positioning the company "to lead the next era of enterprise transformation." Financial Outlook (FY2026): Full Year Revenue $1.571-$1.576 billion, Full Year ARR $1.834-$1.839 billion, Non-GAAP Operating Income ~$340 million. Q3 Guidance: Revenue $390-$395 million, ARR $1.771-$1.776 billion.
